title: Introduction to budgeting for students
summary: Learn the fundamentals of budgeting and how to use tools such as Microsoft Copilot to manage your money effectively, save for future goals, and reduce financial stress.

sections.title: Introduction to budgeting for students
sections.summary: Learn the fundamentals of budgeting and how to use tools such as Microsoft Copilot to manage your money effectively, save for future goals, and reduce financial stress.

lessons.title: Introduction to budgeting for students
lessons.content_md:
Learn the fundamentals of budgeting to manage your money effectively, save for future goals, and reduce financial stress.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/intro-to-budgeting-for-students/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Apply a budgeting method to manage money effectively
lessons.content_md:
Learn about four effective budgeting methods to manage your money, save for the future, and achieve your financial goals.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/apply-budgeting-method/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Apply a budgeting method to manage money effectively

lessons.title: Choose a budgeting tool that fits your preferences and financial goals
lessons.content_md:
Discover budgeting tools and apps designed for middle schoolers. Learn how to make money management easy, engaging, and effective with tools that help you save, track expenses, and set financial goals.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/choose-budgeting-tool/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Choose a budgeting tool that fits your preferences and financial goals

lessons.title: Create a personalized savings plan to work toward a financial goal
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to build a strong financial foundation by exploring practical saving strategies. Discover how small steps today can lead to achieving large goals tomorrow.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/create-personalized-savings-plan/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Create a personalized savings plan to work toward a financial goal

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Introduction to budgeting for students
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Introduction to budgeting for students**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
